component.name: Demote
component.summary: Universal TV and streamer remote for the Steam Deck

description.p: Demote turns your Steam Deck (or any Linux desktop) into a universal remote for the TVs and streaming boxes on your network. It discovers your devices, pairs with them, and gives you a big touch-friendly remote that you can also drive with the Deck's gamepad.

ul.li: Roku players and Roku TVs (TCL, Hisense, onn…)
Android TV / Google TV (Sony, Nvidia Shield, Chromecast with Google TV…)
Generic DLNA / UPnP media renderers (cast video files and URLs)

description.p: The on-screen buttons adapt to whatever the selected device actually supports, and mapped controls show a small Steam Deck input hint. When focused, Demote grabs the gamepad exclusively so a game in the background never sees the presses.

screenshot.caption: The big-touch layout on the Steam Deck
The windowed layout on the desktop

description.p: First release: Samsung, Roku, Vizio, LG webOS, Android TV and DLNA support, a first-run setup wizard, capability-aware UI, and Steam Deck gamepad control.
